raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The target image shows a purple flower with multiple large, distinct petals and a prominent central cluster of stamens/pistils. This visual pattern matches the examples labeled as '81', which feature similar petal structures and central reproductive parts, whereas class '14' features yellow flowers with a different petal arrangement.
</explanation>

<response>81</response>
